Name: FE_WEAPON_THRESHOLD_PARAM
Description: Defines rating thresholds used for weapon evaluation grading in the front-end system.

Fields.Name: A-Rank Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum value required to achieve A-rank rating or higher.

Fields.Name: B-Rank Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum value required to achieve B-rank rating or higher.

Fields.Name: C-Rank Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum value required to achieve C-rank rating or higher.

Fields.Name: D-Rank Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum value required to achieve D-rank rating or higher.

Fields.Name: E-Rank Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum value required to achieve E-rank rating or higher.
